_doc.purpose: SD1.5 NATIVE transparent-background generation via ComfyUI-layerdiffuse.
_doc.how: LayeredDiffusionApply (SD1.5 attn-sharing) patches the model; a normal KSampler + VAEDecode run; LayeredDiffusionDecodeRGBA turns the result into a true RGBA image (real alpha, no background-removal step). Selected when gen.transparent == 'native'.
_doc.requires: The ComfyUI-layerdiffuse custom node (installed by bootstrap.ps1) plus its auto-downloaded SD1.5 models (layer_sd15_transparent_attn + layer_sd15_vae_transparent_decoder).
_doc.injected_by_gen_py: node 4 ckpt_name, 6 positive text, 7 negative text, 5 width/height, 3 seed/steps/cfg/sampler. Node ids match the other workflow templates so gen.py reuses the same field names.
_doc.node_10: LayeredDiffusionApply config MUST be exactly 'SD15, Attention Injection, attn_sharing' (verified against the node's object_info).
